name: Peter's Adzuki Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith Apples, cored and chopped (not peeled)
1 medium Green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1/2 teaspoon Tamari Soy sauce (more or less)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak dried adzuki beans in 3 cups cold water for 24 hours, or use 3 cups boiled water for at least 2 hours.
2. Drain beans completely and boil for 45 minutes in 2 cups fresh water until tender.
3. Heat olive oil in a pan and sauté chopped onion for 1 minute. Add bell pepper and sauté for another minute. Add apples and continue sautéing until onions become translucent.
4. Drain beans and mix with the vegetables. Season with basil, sea salt, and tamari soy sauce.
5. Oil a small casserole dish and pour in the mixture. Place the bay leaf on top of the beans.
6. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
7. Serve with rice and a salad for a delicious and healthy meal! Tastes even better the next day!
